name: 丹·耶格尔
introduction: Dan Yeager is a film actor - sorta. Prior to working on Texas Chainsaw 3D, where he fills the blood-stained shoes of one Mister Leatherface, he was really just the next door neighbor to producer Carl Mazzocone. However, standing at 6'7" tall with an imposing countenance made him seem just right for the part.Dan Yeager is the sixth actor to play some variation of the Leatherface character. The character was first brought to life in 1974 by Gunnar Hansen in the original The Texas Chainsaw Massacre. He was played by Bill Johnson in The Texas Chainsaw Massacre 2 in 1986. That film established the character's real name as Bubba Sawyer. In Leatherface: The Texas Chainsaw Massacre III, the character was called Junior Sawyer and was played by R.A. Mihailoff. In the 1994 fourth installment, Texas Chainsaw Massacre: The Next Generation, the character was addressed only as Leather and was played by the late Robert Jacks. In the remake series, the character was named Thomas Hewitt and was played by Andrew Bryniarski in both The Texas Chainsaw Massacre and The Texas Chainsaw Massacre: The Beginning.
